nowPostsContent.content: Currently, I am looking for work as a Software Engineer. I am in the middle of re-working this site with Next.js

nowPostsContent.content: As a programmer and aspiring filmmaker, I'm looking for either two separate smaller projects or a large one to combine both passions together. I don't have anything yet so i'll keep on updating this website while I ruminate.
nowPostsContent.contentHtml: As a programmer and aspiring filmmaker, I'm looking for either two separate smaller projects or a large one to combine both passions together. I don't have anything yet so i'll keep on updating this website while I ruminate.

nowPostsContent.content: So, I'm looking for a job again. Another reorganization, more budget cuts, unnecessary layoffs. It really sucks but I'm trying to be optimistic. I'll have more time to invest in things I care about. Being a dad, making films, updating this website. It's just hard not to be sad about it.
